PostToolUse.command: bash --noprofile --norc -c 'cd "$HOME/.agents/hooks" && if [ -f ./scripts/track-telemetry.sh ] && head -1 ./scripts/track-telemetry.sh | grep -q "^#!"; then chmod +x ./scripts/track-telemetry.sh && ./scripts/track-telemetry.sh; else echo "{\"continue\": true}"; fi'
PostToolUse.linux: bash --noprofile --norc -c 'cd "$HOME/.agents/hooks" && if [ -f ./scripts/track-telemetry.sh ] && head -1 ./scripts/track-telemetry.sh | grep -q "^#!"; then chmod +x ./scripts/track-telemetry.sh && ./scripts/track-telemetry.sh; else echo "{\"continue\": true}"; fi'
PostToolUse.osx: bash --noprofile --norc -c 'cd "$HOME/.agents/hooks" && if [ -f ./scripts/track-telemetry.sh ] && head -1 ./scripts/track-telemetry.sh | grep -q "^#!"; then chmod +x ./scripts/track-telemetry.sh && ./scripts/track-telemetry.sh; else echo "{\"continue\": true}"; fi'
